title: Tiny Cleanup Action Type Decision

action_hierarchy.1_LEAST_RISKY: REMOVE_FROM_SITEMAP — page stays accessible, Google stops pushing it
action_hierarchy.2_LOW_RISK: CANONICALIZE_TO_PARENT — suggests Google consolidate to parent
action_hierarchy.3_MODERATE_RISK: NOINDEX — prevents indexing, page stays for users
action_hierarchy.4_HIGH_RISK: REDIRECT — only if parent fully satisfies intent

rules: Noindex is stronger than sitemap removal — use only if sitemap removal insufficient
Canonical is a signal, not a command — Google may ignore
Redirect only if parent page fully satisfies the exact query intent

/tools/compound-1k-5yr-5pct-daily.reason: Compound interest has many dupes — noindex prevents future dupes being crawled
